records.question: Which recipes have nutrition information with calories exactly 90.22 and also have recorded quantity details?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT recipe.recipe_id FROM recipe
JOIN nutrition ON recipe.recipe_id = nutrition.recipe_id
JOIN quantity ON recipe.recipe_id = quantity.recipe_id
WHERE nutrition.calories = 90.22
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT r.recipe_id
FROM Recipe r
INNER JOIN Nutrition n ON r.recipe_id = n.recipe_id
INNER JOIN Quantity q ON r.recipe_id = q.recipe_id
WHERE n.calories = 90.22

WHERE quantity.optional = 'FALSE' AND quantity.preparation = 'chopped' AND recipe.cook_min <= 15.0 AND recipe.stnd_min >= 45.0 AND recipe.source = 'The Potato Board' AND recipe.prep_min <= 15.0 AND quantity.max_qty = 3.0

JOIN Quantity q ON r.recipe_id = q.recipe_id

WHERE r.source = 'The Potato Board'
